lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Welcome to the Keldagrim bank! Anything I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you with the Bank of Gielinor?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Oh yes, we are a branch, but an independent branch.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: We have liaised with the Bank of Gielinor. It's healthy to keep a bit of trade going with the human population, you know.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Was there something else you wanted?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Business has always gone well here, but now more than ever. We are getting a constant supply of gold from the new gold mine south of the city.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, I helped to open that up you know!

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Was there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to access my bank account please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to collect items please.
